meta.title: WISE Top 200 Collections (RC13)
meta.scoring_methodology: Editorial portfolio heuristic (0-100). portfolio_score = round(0.35*recognition_score + 0.35*demand_score + 0.30*commercial_score, 1). New RC13 entries are scored on a descending curatorial band with deterministic per-id variation.
